ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly reads 'Luud' with the title 'Power-absorbing' matching Luud's canonical mechanical function — he absorbs organic beings converted to dolls to power himself up. The depicted massive red robotic giant matches Luud's canonical Machine Mutant form from Dragon Ball GT. Verified.

trivia_bullets.text: Luud is a Machine Mutant created by Dr. Myuu, worshipped as a god of destruction by a manipulated cult on Planet Luud. His power-absorption system works by firing a 'Doll Beam' that converts organic beings into dolls, which are then fed into a cauldron to fuel Luud's energy level. The goal was to power Luud to level 3 — his maximum state — in order to funnel that energy to Baby for his restoration. [Source: Villains Wiki / WebSearch snippet from CBR]

Luud's defeat is notable for involving Pan from inside the machine. After Pan was absorbed and trapped within Luud's core, she and Goku coordinated a simultaneous strike — Pan attacking the nucleus from inside while Goku struck from outside. The card title 'Power-absorbing' directly references his organic-to-energy conversion mechanic. [Source: Villains Wiki / WebSearch]

Luud sits in the Uncommon slot (BT3-016) in Cross Worlds, within the Machine Mutant faction cluster that includes Dr. Myuu (BT3-017) and General Rilldo (BT3-020). The Machine Mutant theme in BT3 is the primary antagonist block for the Black Star Dragon Ball Saga side of the set's cross-franchise narrative. [Source: dbs-cardgame.com card list / WebSearch snippet]

related_cards.name: Dr.Myuu, Under Baby's Control (BT3-017)
related_cards.note: Myuu created Luud; Luud's energy output was funneled toward Baby

related_cards.name: Pan (BT3-009)
related_cards.note: Pan was absorbed inside Luud and fought back from within his core

related_cards.name: Hidden Ability, General Rilldo (BT3-020)
related_cards.note: Rilldo is another Machine Mutant commander from the same M-2 faction as Luud

related_cards.name: Handy Giru (BT3-013)
related_cards.note: Giru is also a Machine Mutant from M-2 but defected to heroes' side
